results.title: Only One Can Survive! Football Braces For Explosive Kane vs Haaland Showdown In FIFA World Cup 2026 Quarter-Final
results.description: England face Norway in a blockbuster FIFA World Cup 2026 quarter-final at Miami's Hard Rock Stadium on Saturday. Thomas Tuchel's side reached the last eight after beating Mexico 3-2, while Stale Solbakken's Norway shocked Brazil 2-1. Harry Kane and Erling Haaland headline the clash, with the winners advancing to face Argentina or Switzerland.
